query:
SELECT 
  a.id as action_id,
  LEFT(a.titulo, 50) as titulo,
  a.status,
  ar.id as adjustment_id,
  ar.status as adjustment_status
FROM actions a
LEFT JOIN adjustment_requests ar ON a.id = ar.actionId
ORDER BY a.createdAt DESC;
